examples.description: chest pain — vitals with values, exam, ECG + troponin, stated dx, mandatory disposition

transcript.text: What brings you to the emergency department today?
Chest tightness for two hours, came on while I was walking.
Vitals: blood pressure 148 over 92, heart rate 104, respiratory rate 20, temperature 37 degrees, oxygen saturation 96 percent on room air.
Chest is clear on auscultation. No peripheral oedema.
ECG shows sinus tachycardia, no ST changes. First troponin is negative.
My working diagnosis is non-cardiac chest pain.
Plan to discharge home with cardiology follow-up in one week and return precautions.

claims.text: Patient reports onset two hours ago, while walking.
claims.source_quote: for two hours, came on while I was walking

claims.text: Physician stated vitals: BP 148/92, HR 104, RR 20, temperature 37 C, SpO2 96% on room air.
